frontierComparison.interpretation: The q-avoiding cover closed the whole 29-bucket post-post-post-post-post-successor source token with no survivors, but exposed a new 30-bucket post-post-post-post-post-post-successor boundary. This assembly is a ranked handoff, not global convergence; q179/q181 singleton descent remains blocked.

assembledPieces.claim: The deterministic 29-bucket post-post-post-post-post-successor rank boundary was already assembled into one whole q-avoiding token over q167..q347.

The whole 29-bucket post-post-post-post-post-successor q-avoiding batch cover classified all 104,979,512,685,900,231,199,199,420,715,793,219,898,475,067,029,855,159 source q-avoiding classes with zero survivors.

No q179, q181, or other singleton q-child descent is allowed until a later packet consumes a smaller finite token or closes/decomposes the whole 30-bucket post-post-post-post-post-post-successor boundary.

supportedClaim.claim: The no-survivor 29-bucket post-post-post-post-post-successor q-avoiding cover is assembled into a single whole-boundary rank/compression handoff over the q179..q353 post-post-post-post-post-post-successor surface.
supportedClaim.proofBoundary: This assembly selects the next finite token. It does not close the emitted root children, the emitted q-avoiding boundary, the p479 branches, q97, p443-unavailable, the p4217 complement, collision-free matching, or Problem 848.

compressionCandidate.statement: The repeated row-uniform two-root obstruction law may compress this ladder into a theorem over successor layers, but this packet only assembles the emitted q179..q353 boundary into the next whole-boundary rank/compression token.
compressionCandidate.missingForUse: A theorem proving uniform closure, an impossibility mechanism, or a finite rank decrease for the entire post-post-post-post-post-post-successor boundary.

remainingPuzzleBoundary.openBoundary: The emitted 30 post-post-post-post-post-post-successor buckets, their root children, their q-avoiding boundary, p479-available and p479-unavailable branches, q97, p443-unavailable, the wider p4217 complement, collision-free matching, and Problem 848 remain open.

oneNextAction.action: Compress the 30 post-post-post-post-post-post-successor obstruction-prime buckets, prove a structural rank decrease or impossibility theorem, or emit an exact deterministic 30-bucket boundary before singleton q-child descent.
oneNextAction.failureBoundary: If no compression or structural theorem closes the whole surface, emit a deterministic exact survivor/rank boundary grouped by q and previous support; do not open q179, q181, or any singleton q-child first.
oneNextAction.whyCheaperThanSingleSelector: The q-cover packet already names every emitted bucket and the exact whole-boundary counts, so singleton q descent would fragment a measured finite token instead of consuming it.
oneNextAction.completionRule: All 30 post-post-post-post-post-post-successor buckets are covered, structurally decomposed, proved impossible, or recorded in an exact deterministic rank boundary.

nextTheoremMove: Compress, structurally decompose, prove impossible, or emit the exact deterministic rank boundary for all 30 post-post-post-post-post-post-successor buckets q179..q353; singleton q descent remains blocked.
proofBoundary: This convergence assembly consumes the no-survivor 29-bucket post-post-post-post-post-successor q-cover and selects whole-boundary rank/compression work. It does not close the 209,959,025,371,800,462,398,398,841,431,586,439,796,950,134,059,710,318 root children, the 9,963,724,410,351,871,391,088,180,714,463,609,317,652,043,690,749,610,411,985 q-avoiding classes, the p479 branches, q97, p443-unavailable, the p4217 complement, collision-free matching, or Problem 848.
